question: Which layer of the OSI model is responsible for data encryption and decryption?
At which layer of the TCP/IP model does the IP protocol operate?
Which network device operates at the Network Layer (Layer 3) of the OSI model and forwards data packets between different computer networks?
Which transport layer protocol provides a connection-oriented, reliable, and ordered byte stream delivery?
Which transport layer protocol is connectionless and provides unreliable data transfer?
A MAC address is a hardware address that uniquely identifies a network interface card (NIC). How many bits long is a standard MAC address?
Which version of the Internet Protocol uses 128-bit addresses?
Which protocol is used to resolve domain names (like www.example.com) into IP addresses?
A network that spans a large geographical area, such as across cities or countries, is called a:
In which network topology do all devices connect to a central hub or switch?
What is the primary purpose of a firewall in a network?
options: To filter network traffic and prevent unauthorized access
To convert analog signals to digital
answer: To filter network traffic and prevent unauthorized access

question: Which network device operates at the Data Link Layer (Layer 2) of the OSI model and forwards frames based on MAC addresses?
Which protocol is primarily used for sending email messages from a client to a server or between servers?
Which protocol dynamically assigns IP addresses to devices on a network?
What is the data unit at the Network Layer of the OSI model?
In which type of communication is a single message sent to all devices on a network segment?
What is the standard port number used by the HTTP protocol?
What is the standard port number used by the HTTPS protocol?
What term describes the maximum rate at which data can be transferred over a network connection?
What is the purpose of the Address Resolution Protocol (ARP)?
options: To resolve IP addresses to domain names
To resolve MAC addresses to IP addresses
To resolve IP addresses to MAC addresses
To resolve port numbers to service names
answer: To resolve IP addresses to MAC addresses
